tools.name: get_compound_data
tools.description: Get drug/compound data from PubChem (NIH). Returns CID, IUPAC name, molecular formula, molecular weight, canonical SMILES, InChI, description, and synonyms.

tools.name: get_drug_info
tools.description: Get drug label, safety info, adverse events, or recall data from OpenFDA. Returns brand names, generic name, indications, warnings, dosage, interactions.

tools.name: get_drug_targets
tools.description: Get drug target and bioactivity data from ChEMBL (EMBL-EBI). Returns ChEMBL ID, max clinical phase, molecule type, molecular properties, and indication class.
